response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock My Account  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent block of my account, which was issued due to suspicious payments that I did not make. I have reviewed the details provided and believe the action was unjustified. I am unable to access my account and would like it to be unblocked.  

Please review the transaction history and confirm whether the payments in question were legitimate. I am ready to provide additional information if needed.  

Thank you for your attention.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
